examples: A classic paper on the topic is entitled the Unbearable Automaticity Of Being.

might be a new-age cliche, but take it literally and you'd soon seize up.
Now, copper continuous extrusion production line composed of these equipments and their relevant auxiliary facilities has had a very high automaticity.
And the importance of teaching for Automaticity becomes more important than ever, when even instant-recall is no longer enough to help our children to get ahead.
